## LazyInstantiator class

A helper which supports lazy materialization of values based on a base map.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class LazyInstantiator<TKey extends string = string, TBase = unknown, TValue = unknown> 
```

## Remarks

- `base` defines keyspace and provides base values. - `loaded` contains only materialized values. - `items` provides [LazyItem](./ts-utils.collections.lazyitem.md) views for base keys.

Neither `base` nor `items` will materialize values.
